title: Beta Recobbled
description: An overhaul for Minecraft Beta 1.7.3! Adds new blocks, items, structures, and recipes.
body:
Minecraft Beta Recobbled is an overhaul of b1.7.3 with the intent of fixing bugs and adding new content while maintaining the jank that made this version special.

Recommended method of install is by importing the MultiMC/Prism instance, though that is not available here due to Modrinth rules (it can be found in our discord server). The second-best method is to install the zip file from this page, and use the "add to Minecraft.jar" button on your b1.7.3 instance.

We have a discord server if you're interested in keeping up with development (and getting fast access to the latest versions), and there is a trailer up on youtube if you'd like to see some of the new features in action.

The changelog below only features changes up to version 1.4 and is incorrect in some places. Please check the discord server linked for up-to-date information.

GENERAL ADDITIONS:

-readded the old bloody pigman texture in the form of a new mob.

-added bloodstone, a diamond-equivalent tier of tools and armor crafted from 3 iron and 3 blood (dropped by bloody pigmen). Bloodstone has higher durability but lower speed and damage.

-added new dungeons made out of bricks, with different loot. May contain something special.

-added functioning sponges, found in brick dungeons.

-added the Freezer. Put water in the top and something cold in as fuel and it'll create ice.

-added permafrost, crafted from 4 ice.

-added stone, lapis, and netherrack bricks. Crafted from 4 cobblestone, lapis, or netherrack, respectively.

-added crates, crafted from 4 cobblestone and 5 wooden planks.

-added crab pots, crafted from 8 sticks and 1 string.

-pumpkins can now be crafted into pumpkin seeds for farming. Pumpkin seeds can also be roasted for food.

-added coral that generates in sandy waters.

-gold tools now have silk touch, as long as you use the right tool for the job.

-crash slab blocks can now be crafted from 2 stone slabs.

-added a durability display in the lower left hand corner.

-gold armor protects against fall and drowning damage.

-added cacao trees.

-added several new achievements.

-grass now drops seeds when hoed.

-added beech trees.

-added a few secrets.

-added coal blocks

-added glowstone lamps

-added nether dungeons

-added soul husks that spawn in nether dungeons

-added pedestals, used to display items

-added fire lances


BALANCE CHANGES/BUG FIXES:

-stairs now drop themselves when broken.

-boats now drop themselves when broken.

-made boats less fragile.

-increased boat speed significantly.

-armor no longer takes damage from drowning or falling.

-increased dungeon generation rates because more dungeon is more fungeon.

-sheep now regrow their wool.

-increased diamond tool mining speed.

-increased gold tool durability.

-increased yield of several recipes.

-increased harvest yield of several blocks.

-increased crafting table mining speed while using a sword.

-fixed several block mining times.

-added proper generation conditions for ice deserts.

-added seed and biome info to the f3 screen.

-ridden pigs can now be controlled.

-several other miscellaneous fixes, rebalances, and additions.
